items.title: Kenneth Walker: Could catch more passes with Chiefs
items.body_text: Walker suggested Tuesday that he might have an opportunity to catch more passes with the Chiefs than he did with the Seahawks, Eric Edholm of NFL.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Tyrod Taylor: Linking up with Packers
items.body_text: Taylor (knee) is signing a contract with the Packers, Tom Pelissero of NFL Network reports Monday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Anthony Richardson: Present at Monday's voluntary OTAs
items.body_text: Richardson (eye) reported for voluntary offseason workouts Monday, Stephen Holder of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
